nodes.name: Webhook
nodes.notes: DEACTIVATED. One-time admin trigger. Seeds 14 insurance-vertical archetypes into signal_archetypes. Idempotent — uses ON CONFLICT (niche_name, archetype_name) DO NOTHING via Supabase Prefer header. Mary POSTs once after deploy with internal_secret. Other verticals get their own seed workflows in subsequent vertical-launch sprints (real estate, mortgage, dental, construction, consulting, agencies, financial advisors).

parameters.jsCode:
// Insurance starter archetype library — 14 vertical-specific archetypes.
// Patterned per OPERATIONS_HANDBOOK §35.13 and adjusted for compounding signals.
// Each archetype's trigger_signals list MUST all be present (un-acted-on, last 14d)
// in behavioral_signals for the archetype to fire. Single-signal archetypes
// fire on first detection; multi-signal compound archetypes need full set.
const archetypes = [
  {
    archetype_name: 'birthday_window_7d',
    description: 'Lead birthday within next or past 7 days — light-touch personal-relevance moment.',
    trigger_signals: ['birthday_window_7d'],
    recommended_action: 'send_email',
    recommended_channel: 'email',
    message_template_inline: 'Hi {{first_name}}, hope you have a great year ahead. Quick check-in — would now be a good time to review your coverage at {{company}}?',
    sensitivity_floor: 'low',
    cool_down_days: 365
  },
  {
    archetype_name: 'lead_anniversary_30d',
    description: 'First 30-day check-in — confirm onboarding sticking and surface any new needs.',
    trigger_signals: ['lead_anniversary_30d'],
    recommended_action: 'send_email',
    recommended_channel: 'email',
    message_template_inline: 'Hi {{first_name}}, it has been a month since we connected — anything new at {{company}} I should know about coverage-wise?',
    sensitivity_floor: 'low',
    cool_down_days: 60
  },
  {
    archetype_name: 'lead_anniversary_365d',
    description: 'Annual check-in. Most insurance policies renew annually; this is the natural review window.',
    trigger_signals: ['lead_anniversary_365d'],
    recommended_action: 'send_email',
    recommended_channel: 'email',
    message_template_inline: 'Hi {{first_name}}, marks one year since we first spoke. Quick 15-min review of how things are going at {{company}}?',
    sensitivity_floor: 'low',
    cool_down_days: 180
  },
  {
    archetype_name: 'policy_renewal_window_60d',
    description: '60 days out from policy renewal — start the conversation early to avoid auto-renewal lock-in.',
    trigger_signals: ['policy_renewal_60d'],
    recommended_action: 'send_email',
    recommended_channel: 'email',
    message_template_inline: 'Hi {{first_name}}, your policy renews in about 60 days — best time to compare carriers before the auto-renewal locks in. Worth a 20-min review?',
    sensitivity_floor: 'low',
    cool_down_days: 90
  },
  {
    archetype_name: 'policy_renewal_window_30d',
    description: '30 days out — escalate channel to phone if email did not land.',
    trigger_signals: ['policy_renewal_30d'],
    recommended_action: 'phone_call',
    recommended_channel: 'voice',
    message_template_inline: 'Hi {{first_name}}, calling about your renewal coming up next month — wanted to make sure you have options to compare before it auto-renews.',
    sensitivity_floor: 'low',
    cool_down_days: 30
  },
  {
    archetype_name: 'policy_renewal_window_7d',
    description: '7 days out — last-call urgency; agent escalates to human if no response within 24h.',
    trigger_signals: ['policy_renewal_7d'],
    recommended_action: 'queue_for_review',
    recommended_channel: 'voice',
    message_template_inline: 'Hi {{first_name}}, your renewal is in 7 days. If you do not hear from us, your current carrier will auto-renew. Quick call?',
    sensitivity_floor: 'low',
    cool_down_days: 14
  },
  {
    archetype_name: 'new_baby_life_insurance_opportunity',
    description: 'Compound: family addition signal + life-insurance niche relevance — strong upsell trigger.',
    trigger_signals: ['family_addition'],
    recommended_action: 'send_email',
    recommended_channel: 'email',
    message_template_inline: 'Hi {{first_name}}, congratulations on the news. Many of my clients revisit life coverage when family changes — happy to walk you through what fits now.',
    sensitivity_floor: 'medium',
    cool_down_days: 365
  },
  {
    archetype_name: 'business_expansion_commercial',
    description: 'Lead company has expanded (new hires / new location) — commercial coverage gap likely.',
    trigger_signals: ['business_expansion'],
    recommended_action: 'send_email',
    recommended_channel: 'email',
    message_template_inline: 'Hi {{first_name}}, congrats on the growth at {{company}}. Worth checking your commercial coverage scales with the new headcount — quick 15-min review?',
    sensitivity_floor: 'low',
    cool_down_days: 90
  },
  {
    archetype_name: 'home_purchase_home_insurance',
    description: 'Lead address-change signal indicates home purchase — home insurance binding window.',
    trigger_signals: ['address_change_residential'],
    recommended_action: 'send_email',
    recommended_channel: 'email',
    message_template_inline: 'Hi {{first_name}}, looks like a move recently — home insurance binding usually has to happen pre-closing. Want me to pull a same-day quote?',
    sensitivity_floor: 'medium',
    cool_down_days: 180
  },
  {
    archetype_name: 'storm_damage_claim_check',
    description: 'Major weather event in lead geographic area — proactive claim-readiness check.',
    trigger_signals: ['weather_severe_local'],
    recommended_action: 'send_email',
    recommended_channel: 'email',
    message_template_inline: 'Hi {{first_name}}, saw the storm in {{city}}. Want to make sure you know what your policy covers and how to file fast if there is damage?',
    sensitivity_floor: 'low',
    cool_down_days: 30
  },
  {
    archetype_name: 'commercial_fleet_growth',
    description: 'Business adds vehicles — commercial fleet insurance review trigger.',
    trigger_signals: ['fleet_size_increase'],
    recommended_action: 'send_email',
    recommended_channel: 'email',
    message_template_inline: 'Hi {{first_name}}, the fleet at {{company}} has grown — commercial-auto pricing scales differently past certain unit counts. Worth a check?',
    sensitivity_floor: 'low',
    cool_down_days: 120
  },
  {
    archetype_name: 'job_promotion_increased_coverage',
    description: 'Lead promoted / new role — income increase often means coverage gap on existing policies.',
    trigger_signals: ['job_promotion'],
    recommended_action: 'send_email',
    recommended_channel: 'email',
    message_template_inline: 'Hi {{first_name}}, congratulations on the new role. With income changes it is worth a coverage review — many people are under-insured after a step up.',
    sensitivity_floor: 'medium',
    cool_down_days: 180
  },
  {
    archetype_name: 'fsra_regulatory_change',
    description: 'FSRA regulatory change affecting insurance brokers in Ontario — informational outreach demonstrating expertise.',
    trigger_signals: ['fsra_regulatory_filing'],
    recommended_action: 'send_email',
    recommended_channel: 'email',
    message_template_inline: 'Hi {{first_name}}, FSRA pushed a change worth knowing about. Quick summary attached — applies to your situation if {{company}} is in the affected band.',
    sensitivity_floor: 'low',
    cool_down_days: 90
  },
  {
    archetype_name: 'extended_quiet_period_60d',
    description: 'Lead has had no engagement for 60+ days — gentle re-engagement before status decay to Closed Lost.',
    trigger_signals: ['quiet_period_60d'],
    recommended_action: 'send_email',
    recommended_channel: 'email',
    message_template_inline: 'Hi {{first_name}}, just checking in — anything I can help with at {{company}} this quarter, or should we park things until renewal?',
    sensitivity_floor: 'low',
    cool_down_days: 90
  }
];

return archetypes.map(function (a) {
  return { json: Object.assign({
    niche_name: 'insurance',
    active: true
  }, a, { trigger_signals: a.trigger_signals }) };
});

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ niche_name: $json.niche_name, archetype_name: $json.archetype_name, description: $json.description, trigger_signals: $json.trigger_signals, recommended_action: $json.recommended_action, recommended_channel: $json.recommended_channel, message_template_inline: $json.message_template_inline, sensitivity_floor: $json.sensitivity_floor, cool_down_days: $json.cool_down_days, active: $json.active }) }}

nodes.name: Insert Archetype
nodes.notes: Prefer header includes 'resolution=ignore-duplicates' so the UNIQUE(niche_name, archetype_name) constraint dedupes silently — workflow is idempotent.

parameters.jsCode:
const inserted = $('Build Archetype Rows').all().length;
return { json: { ok: true, archetypes_seeded: inserted, niche: 'insurance', message: 'Insurance archetype seed complete. ' + inserted + ' archetypes upserted (idempotent). Next vertical seed workflows: real estate / mortgage / dental / construction / consulting / agencies / financial advisors.' } };
